settings.heading: When your home looks empty, you become a target.
settings.subheading: Burglars look for easy marks—dark windows, silent halls, predictable timers. 70% strike in daytime. They need five minutes. Wi-Fi jammers defeat cameras and alarms. Kevin® helps your home, flat, office, or shop look occupied from the outside—before anyone tests the door.
settings.tile_1_title: Five minutes is all it takes
settings.tile_1_body: Burglars can break in and out in minutes—often before sirens or monitoring respond. Kevin adds believable presence before anyone reaches the handle.
settings.tile_2_body: Burglars use jamming devices to disable Wi-Fi cameras and alarm systems. Kevin keeps simulating from local storage—even when the network goes down.
settings.tile_3_body: Statistics show most burglaries happen during the day when homes look empty. Kevin varies light, shadow, and sound so your space reads as lived-in.

settings.heading: Kevin® simulates people at home—so you can leave calmly.
settings.subheading: Swiss-engineered presence simulation: light scenarios, moving shadows, and everyday sounds—cleaning, cooking, conversations, playing. No cameras. No microphones. Works in homes, offices, shops, warehouses, and holiday properties.
settings.pillar_1_body: Warm, changing scenes make rooms look actively used—not simply lit. Kevin adapts rhythm for day and night deterrence.
settings.pillar_2_body: Projected silhouettes suggest one or more people inside. Visible through curtains—exactly where burglars look first.
settings.pillar_3_body: 70+ hours of built-in simulations plus your own uploads. AI-generated household sounds adapt to feel personal and less repetitive.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® presence simulator — Swiss-engineered Kevin 3, studio product photo

settings.heading: Plug in. Schedule. Leave with peace of mind.
settings.subheading: No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel. Connect Kevin, set weekly schedules or geo-fencing in the app, and let believable presence run from local storage on the device.
settings.step_1_body: Place Kevin near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect power—typical use around 9 watts.
settings.step_2_body: Tell Kevin when to simulate presence—or let geo-fencing activate automatically the moment you leave, even for a short walk.
settings.step_3_body: Light, shadow, and sound play from local storage—not streamed from the cloud. Jammer-resilient protection when Wi-Fi security fails.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® device — side profile product photo

settings.heading: Protection that runs while you live your life.
settings.subheading: Activate instantly, schedule in advance, or let geo-fencing turn Kevin on when you leave. Manage multiple devices and properties from one app.
settings.phone_1_caption: Simulation — tune volume, night mode, and characteristics
settings.phone_2_caption: Schedule — set protection by day and hour
settings.tile_1_body: Schedule simulations for weekends, holidays, or daily routines—protection that fits around your lifestyle.
settings.tile_2_body: Kevin knows when you leave and starts protecting your space—no taps, no texts, just smart automation.
settings.tile_3_body: Record or upload familiar home sounds. Kevin uses them—and AI-generated household audio—to create a more believable presence.
settings.tile_4_body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.
settings.phone_6_caption: Kevin — activation, scheduling, and simulation controls
settings.phone_3_caption: Device — rename, customize, and manage firmware
settings.phone_4_caption: Geo-fencing — Kevin activates when you leave
settings.phone_5_caption: Location — set where Kevin activates automatically

settings.heading: Who Kevin® is for.
settings.subheading: Whether you commute, walk the dog, head on holiday, manage multiple properties, or already own an alarm—Kevin® fits how you actually live.
settings.persona_1_body: Start your day with confidence. On your way to work, activate Kevin® via the app. While you are out, Kevin makes it look like you are still at home—so you can focus on your job, not your doorstep.
settings.persona_1_quote: "I switch Kevin on from the app before I leave. The house feels occupied—not just lit."
settings.persona_2_body: Alarms detect intrusions—Kevin® helps prevent them. Complement your existing system with realistic presence simulation so burglars think twice before approaching.
settings.persona_2_quote: "Our alarm tells us if something happens. Kevin helps make the house look like the wrong target."
settings.persona_3_body: Juggling several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin® to each location and manage them all in one app—believable occupancy day and night.
settings.persona_3_quote: "Both flats look lived-in without asking neighbours for favours. One app, full coverage."

settings.heading: Success looks like a home that feels alive.
settings.quote_1: "From the pavement, the light and movement make the room feel occupied. That is exactly what I wanted."
settings.quote_2: "A friend thought someone was inside and rang the bell. Kevin did its job before anyone reached the door."
settings.quote_3: "The shadow effects are the part people notice. From the stairwell, the apartment does not feel empty."
settings.summary_body: Kevin is simple to place, private by design, and most convincing from the exact perspective that matters: outside the home.

settings.heading: One-time purchase. Lifetime updates included.
settings.subheading: Buy Kevin® outright with free lifetime membership, software updates, 3-year Swiss warranty, and free delivery across Europe.

settings.label: Power
settings.value: Mains powered with 3 m cable; typical use around 9 W

settings.label: Connectivity
settings.value: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for app control; simulations play locally on device (jammer-resilient)

settings.label: Privacy
settings.value: No camera. No microphone. No listening. No third-party sharing.

settings.label: Simulation library
settings.value: 70+ hours of activities and sounds stored locally on the device

settings.label: Best placement
settings.value: Near a visible window, with a wall or ceiling for shadows

settings.heading: Do not leave your home looking empty.
settings.subheading: Let Kevin® become your virtual roommate—making your home feel alive while you are away. Free delivery across Europe. Plug and play. 9 watts. No cameras or microphones.
